case_title: ANGELO SPAGNOLI et al VS. BRITISH AIRWAYS, PLC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY SPAGNOLI, ANGELO ZUNINO, KRISTA AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS, PLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SPAGNOLI, ANGELO AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS, PLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-31-2007, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS, PLC
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-15-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF NOV-20-2007 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO NOV-20-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JAN-15-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2007 - JUDGMENT. F. RAYRAY, CLERK; JPT STEVE LAU.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SPAGNOLI, ANGELO ZUNINO, KRISTA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRITISH AIRWAYS, PLC $5,125.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,185.00, REMAINDER PAYMENT TO BE PAID PRIOR TO JAN 01, 2008. PLAINTIFF TO DISMISS ALL CLAIMS WITH PREJUDICE UPON RECEIPT OF THE REMAINDER PAYMENT OF $2125.90. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CORRESPONDENCE FROM BRITISH AIRWAYS TO THE PLTFS COPIED TO THE COURT.
